$comment: 1.21 style resource pack override for the toolkit embedded in the pattern provider management area.

management_toolkit_background.$comment: Embedded toolkit background in the management area. wcwt_tools.png effective size is 162x72.

management_toolkit_scrollbar.$comment: Embedded toolkit scrollbar shifted 2px right for the built-in 1.21 style resource pack.

management_toolkit_slots.$comment: Embedded toolkit slot anchor. First slot starts at background left=1, top=1; slots are 16x16 with 18px step.
